title: Issue Triage Report Route
description: Implement report-only Route Decision coverage for issue triage observations with deterministic scripts instead of runtime agent guesswork.

activation.branch_exception: Recommended zjal/<roadmap-id> branch naming could not be created in the current Git sandbox; zjal-issue-triage-report-route keeps the roadmap id visible without editing hidden Git refs.

nodes.label: Issue triage report route implementation

decisions.answer: Yes. It records issue triage observations only and does not mutate GitHub issues, labels, comments, assignments, milestones, or formal lifecycle state.

decisions.q: Where should deterministic protocol decisions live?
decisions.answer: Use deterministic replay scripts and tests for allowed signal kinds, status enums, forbidden protocol terms, dedupe behavior, human review routing, and the evidence path.

decisions.q: How should branch naming exception be handled?
decisions.answer: Use zjal-issue-triage-report-route and record the exception because zjal/<roadmap-id> could not be created without hidden Git ref mutation.

nodes.notes: Activation request was created through issue #31 before implementation.

nodes.label: Deterministic issue triage report replay contract
nodes.commit_intent: Add issue-triage-report replay and contract tests.

nodes.label: Route table and durable documentation alignment
nodes.commit_intent: Wire issue-triage-report into route table, docs, and package scripts.
nodes.verification_gate: npm run test:route-decision && npm run validate:registry
nodes.notes: Updated route table, package scripts, CI gates, Issue Triage pattern, registry entry, Route Table Architecture, Triage Architecture, testing doc, dogfood status, and route evolution checklist. Verification passed: npm run test:route-decision && npm run validate:registry. Terminology scan passed for stale issue-triage-report protocol terms.

nodes.label: Roadmap closeout and PR handoff evidence
nodes.commit_intent: Consolidate process decisions into durable docs and delete process roadmap files.
nodes.notes: Final verification passed before feature commit: git diff --check, npm run test:issue-triage-report, npm run test:route-decision, npm run test:zj-loop-init, npm run validate:registry, npm run check:zj-loop-init, and bash scripts/ci-validate-gates.sh. First ci-validate attempt failed on sandbox DNS for registry.npmmirror.com; rerun with network permission passed. Closeout commit remains pending.
